message:
test(procinfo): expand from 41 to 55 tests for process info utilities (wa-39su5)

Add 14 new tests in lib.rs covering: flatten with all-empty executables,
root-only exe with empty children, four-level deep nesting, process info
with argv fields, debug output containing pid and name, default cwd,
children map operations, individual status variant debug strings (Idle,
Zombie, LockBlocked), and live process queries for start_time, cwd
non-empty, and executable existence on disk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
